slice: Direct follow-up after the Duplicate quota-failure fix: a real-time total/consumed readout on the Welcome screen. No browser reports an exact localStorage quota, so this shows what's genuinely measurable (getStorageStats(), a real Blob-based byte count of every key World Builder writes) against a disclosed conservative 5 MB reference floor, with a live bar and a real warning once at or past it -- also clarifying that only a published Theme moves to Supabase, not the editable Project itself. Updates live via the existing renderMyWorlds(). Verified via Playwright at 0%/40%/80%/full states. goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged.
